name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: yaml comments above operator entries are preserved when merge-registry.sh re-emits the merged catalog
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "# Why we use this source: operator-curated
- id: op-src
  name: Op
  url: https://op.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" --preserve-comments && grep "operator-curated" merged.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
